result.transcription:
Politics: Inteligenca agencis can use this tool when smart city, is installed in other countries to gain information about them. Then countries and their population will no longer have privacy and security.
Money: Robbers can take these valuable installed materials: sensors, cameras, routers and others to sell them or use them. It will cost money to reinstall those materials.
Entertainment: Some bad actors can troll the waste collection services by manipulating the sensors to make the waste collection redirect the collectors to the same localisation several times.

- Category : Money
Very expensive. The realization of this software is a really good idea that it might require a lot of money to build it or even in using it, since it might need some resources to be useful. Or it can encourage the local authorities to spend a lot of money.
- Category : self-interest
Some people might use it for disinformation, since it can probably use it for harm. They would probably harm people who didn't do anything who respected the laws and follow the rules and they get in trouble because of some sort of disinformation that could harm. Like for example: a person who might have come slightly above the street by accident and then just realize that it was actually a red light instead of a green and then get into trouble for nothing.
- Category : Ideas
Some people might not agree to each other for some circumstances like for example ventilation and temperature being adjusted automatically with dependence on the weather outside or the environment. Because some peoples people are probably more sensitive to heat or cold than others and may be more uncomfortable with the automation adjustment than other and this could probably lead to unfairness between people which could probably not be satisfied with those conditions.

Money: A competitor of the company Smartcity can hack the centralized monitoring system, this would lead to a mess with the traffic and the bins. The company Smartcity would be negatively impacted in their reputation and this would lead to the loss of money by not signing contract with other European countries. The motivation for the competitor is the money they gain some part of the market.
Politics: A competitor of the current "maire (chef de la ville)" can disturb the sensors on waste-bins, the harm would be that citizens wouldn't be happy anymore with the council of the city because there would be bins everywhere due to the disruption of the sensors. The motivation for the competitor would be to be elected in the next elections.
Ideas: A group of people pro-privacy can destroy/cover the cameras used to analyze the real-time traffic arguing that it is not in their ideology to be looked after by ML augmented cameras. The stakeholders harmed would be all the users of the road. They wouldn't have any information about traffic jams anymore. And the traffic light can malfunction due to the loss of information.
